case_title: DONNELL JONES VS. LANGFORD BROWN DBA NORCAL APPLIANCE REPAIR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $165.00 FILED BY JONES, DONNELL AS TO DEFENDANT LANGFORD BROWN DBA NORCAL APPLIANCE REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2010 - JUDGMENT.
